name: Creamy Easter Eggs or Candy Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup candied fruit, chopped (cherries and pineapple)
recipeInstructions: This is excellent for making Easter eggs but you can also make candy bars by patting the candy into a square on waxed paper, cutting into bars and dipping in chocolate. Buy invert sugar at cake and decorating stores. In a small saucepan, combine invert sugar, fruit and nuts. Stir and boil for 2-3 minutes; drain, reserving liquid. Combine the reserved liquid, sugar, corn syrup, salt and water in a 2-quart saucepan. Cover tightly and bring to a boil. Uncover and place a candy thermometer in the pan; cook to 250 degrees. Pour the candy out on a marble slab and cool to lukewarm. Work the candy with a spatula until it is opaque. Add vanilla and marshmallow cream. Continue to paddle the candy until creamy. Add the prepared fruit and nuts; knead into the candy. Form into egg shapes and let stand for a couple of hours. Dip in chocolate. Makes 16 medium-size eggs. Jo Merrill
